name: Chatwoot Adapter
description: Two-way sync between a WhatsApp session and a Chatwoot inbox: relays WhatsApp messages (1:1 and groups, with media) into Chatwoot as an API-channel inbox, sends agent replies back to WhatsApp, and hands a chat over to a human agent — silencing other OpenWA bots — when an agent takes it in Chatwoot. First consumer of the OpenWA Integration SDK v1; runs sandboxed in the plugin worker.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

baseUrl.title: Chatwoot base URL
baseUrl.description: Public https URL of your Chatwoot (Cloud or a public-domain self-hosted install), e.g. https://app.chatwoot.com. Its host is auto-added to this plugin's outbound allowlist. Private/LAN hosts are not supported.

apiToken.title: API access token
apiToken.description: A Chatwoot access token (Profile > Access Token, or an agent-bot token) with access to the API-channel inbox.

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Your Chatwoot account id (the number in the dashboard URL, /app/accounts/<id>/...).

inboxId.title: API-channel inbox ID
inboxId.description: The API-channel inbox this adapter posts into and relays agent replies from.

relayGroups.title: Relay group chats
relayGroups.description: Relay WhatsApp group chats. Each group maps to one synthetic Chatwoot contact; messages are prefixed with the sender's name.

relayMedia.title: Relay inbound media to Chatwoot
relayMedia.description: Upload inbound WhatsApp media (images, files, audio) to Chatwoot as attachments.

relayOwnMessages.title: Relay your own outbound sends
relayOwnMessages.description: Mirror messages you send from a linked phone / the WhatsApp app / the OpenWA API into Chatwoot as outgoing messages, so the thread isn't one-sided. Your Chatwoot agent replies are never duplicated. Turn off to keep phone-composed messages out of the helpdesk.

backfillLimit.title: History backfill (messages per chat)
backfillLimit.description: When a chat first opens in Chatwoot, import this many recent messages (both directions, with media) so agents see prior context. 0 disables it. Clamped to 100 host-side. Requires OpenWA 0.8.5+.

backfillAllOnce.title: Bulk-import all chats once on setup
backfillAllOnce.description: In addition to the per-conversation backfill, run a one-time sweep that imports the history of every existing chat. Needs 'History backfill' above > 0. Runs once per session; large inboxes may take a while.
